span.p:
Schema ID: EH6ekLjSr8V32WyFbGe1zXjTzFs9PkTYmupJ9H65O14g
Version: 1.0.0
Issued by LE to QVI
Authorizes ECR credential issuance

div.style: text-align: center; white-space: break-spaces; display: table; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; width: 200px;

span.p: Required fields:\ni (QVI AID), dt, AID (Person),\nLEI, personLegalName, engagementContextRole

div.style: text-align: center; white-space: break-spaces; display: table; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; width: 200px;

span.p: Links to LE credential\nSchema: ENPXp1vQzRF6JwIuS-mp2U8Uf1MoADoP_GqQ62VsDZWY\nOperator: I2I (issuer to issuer)

div.style: text-align: center; white-space: break-spaces; display: table; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; width: 200px;

span.p: ECR Auth includes privacy\nconsiderations for IPEX/ACDC usage
